name: tornasuk
summary: The supreme elder devil to whom the degenerate Eskimo cult of Greenland addressed queer hereditary rituals, besides nameless rites and human sacrifices.
description:
Among the degenerate Eskimos of Greenland there were, besides nameless rites and human sacrifices, certain queer hereditary rituals addressed to a supreme elder devil or tornasuk.

Professor Webb took a careful phonetic copy of such a ritual from an aged angekok or wizard-priest, expressing the sounds in Roman letters as best he knew how.

sources.quote: Besides nameless rites and human sacrifices there were certain queer hereditary rituals addressed to a supreme elder devil or tornasuk; and of this Professor Webb had taken a careful phonetic copy from an aged angekok or wizard-priest, expressing the sounds in Roman letters as best he knew how.
sources.context: Chapter 2, The Tale of Inspector Legrasse
